title: Cobblemon GTS
description: A Global Trading System mod for Cobblemon that allows selling of Pokemon and Items.
body:
A Global Trading System mod for [Cobblemon](https://cobblemon.com/) that allows selling of Pokemon and Items.

## Installation

This mod can be ran on both [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) and [NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/). It has a few dependencies:

- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
- [Impactor](https://modrinth.com/mod/impactor)

If you need any help, check out our [wiki](https://github.com/PokeSplashDEV/GTS/wiki) or join our [discord](https://discord.gg/3ryBBAB7CX).


## Features

- Pokemon and Item listings
- Configurable minimum prices for IVs, Hidden Ability, Specified Items.
- Item & Pokemon Blacklist
- Moderation

## Commands

``/gts``

``/gts sell <pokemon/item>``

``/gts manage``

``/gts expired``

``/gts history``

``/gts reload``

## Permissions

``gts.user.*``

``gts.moderation.*``

``gts.admin.*``
